reviews.comment:
La única YPF de Sta. Clara,  aunque casi siempre hay cola, son muy rápidos en el expendido.

(Translated by Google)
The only YPF station in Sta. Clara, although there is almost always a queue, is very fast at serving fuel.

reviews.comment:
En plena temporada muy lento el despacho de combustible !!! Nos fuimos sin cargar NAFTA

(Translated by Google)
Fuel service was incredibly slow during peak season! We left without filling up.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!

reviews.comment:
Deja mucho que desear muy poco ritmo para atender, pongan un playero más con dos evidentemente no es suficiente. Por qué son muy lentos

(Translated by Google)
The service is very slow and leaves much to be desired. They need to add another attendant; two is clearly not enough. Why are they so slow?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNazVqazhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muchos autos muy lentos para atender, poco prácticos con la cobranza cuando no es en efectivo. Deja mucho que desear pero lamentablemente es lo único que hay en la zona exceptuando una Shell vieja que nisiquiera dice Shell en la segunda rotonda de santa clara

(Translated by Google)
Many cars are very slow to serve, and they're inconvenient with non-cash payments. It leaves a lot to be desired, but unfortunately, it's the only thing in the area except for an old Shell store that doesn't even say Shell in the second Santa Clara roundabout.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNay1pNGpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.
Estratégicamente ubicada.
Cuenta con espacio para descansar.
Un sitio para compras de artículos varios y para obtener agua  caliente.
Nunca hay que esperar demasiado tiempo para cargar combustible, aún en temporada alta es rápida la atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.
Strategically located.
It has a rest area.
A place to buy various items and get hot water.
You never have to wait too long to refuel; even during peak season, service is quick.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNZ19hTnJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las Ypf de la costa deberían tener posibilidad de extraer dinero.

(Translated by Google)
YPF stations on the coast should have the option to withdraw money.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNM1piaGxRRRAB
